title: AFN Supports SB 54: Smart Public Safety and Criminal Justice Reform
summary: At the 2017 AFN Convention, AFN delegates passed AFN Resolution 17-15, in support of SB 54. The Alaska Legislature is currently in special session to consider amendments to the groundbreaking criminal justice reform legislation known as SB 91. The proposed SB 54 contains some important fixes, but do...
